title: Raised wire wreath round rings holly mossing Christmas frame - (2 Pack, 14 Inch)
features: Create Stunning Christmas Wreaths: Elevate your holiday decor with our raised wire wreath rings. Craft the perfect festive wreath with holly, moss, foliage, and more!
Versatile Craft Base: These sturdy wire frames are not limited to Christmas. Use them for various craft projects and seasonal displays.
Available in 8, 10, 12, 14, and 16-inch diameters to suit your creative needs. -- Choose from packs of 2, 5, 10, or 20 rings for your crafting convenience.
Durable Unfinished Metal: Made from quality metal for lasting durability. Perfect for decorating to match your style.
Unique Raised Design: The raised center or outer edge adds a distinctive touch to your wreaths and crafts.
description: Elevate your holiday decorations with our Premium Raised Wire Wreath Rings, perfect for crafting exquisite Christmas wreaths and versatile enough for year-round DIY projects. Crafting your own festive wreath has never been easier. Our sturdy wire frames provide the ideal base for your creative endeavors. Whether you're aiming for a classic Christmas look with holly, moss, foliage, and berries or exploring a wide range of craft ideas, these wreath rings have got you covered. What sets our wreath rings apart is their unique raised design. You can choose to position them with the center raised or the outer edge raised, depending on your preference. This distinctive feature adds an extra layer of charm to your creations. With various sizes available, including 8, 10, 12, 14, and 16 inches in diameter, you can easily find the perfect fit for your projects. Additionally, we offer these rings in three different pack sizes: 2, 5, 10, and 20, allowing you to stock up for multiple crafting sessions or events.
